creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Please discard the previously submitted diff, and refer to the attached diff
which updates editors/p5-Padre to v.0.62.

This diff depends on following PRs:

* ports/146482 -- new port: textproc/p5-Pod-Perldoc
* ports/146058 -- update port: devel/p5-Module-Build
* ports/146972 -- new port: devel/p5-ReadOnly-XS
* ports/146973 -- new port: textproc/p5-PPIx-Regexp
* ports/146974 -- new port: textproc/p5-POD2-Base

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA

Sent via Gnus from GNU Emacs
